differential_diagnoses: Chronic mesenteric ischemia due to venous congestion/portal vein thrombosis
Occult malignancy (e.g., hepatocellular carcinoma or pancreaticobiliary pathology)
next_steps: CT angiography of the abdomen to evaluate mesenteric arterial and venous patency
Echocardiogram to evaluate for right heart failure or constrictive pericarditis
Dose adjustment or discontinuation of nadolol due to hemodynamic instability (hypotension and bradycardia)
Stool microscopy for ova and parasites (specifically Schistosoma)
Hematology consultation for comprehensive thrombophilia evaluation
Transjugular liver biopsy with hepatic venous pressure gradient (HVPG) measurement
Aggressive pain management and nutritional assessment for weight loss
